title: age-group — default catalog reference
description: 10-entry seeded catalog dispatched to every tenant on TenantProvisioned. Covers the standard youth-development progression (U6..U18 in 2-year steps) plus adult, senior, and masters divisions. Every entry has sport_key=null (generic — applies across every sport) and organization_id=null (tenant-wide). The `Adult` group is is_default=true for the (tenant, null, null) tuple — every tenant lands with a working default the moment provisioning finishes.
notes: Bounds use inclusive integer ranges. `U6` covers ages 3-5 (a 3-year-old is 'under 6' inclusive of 3-5). `Adult` covers 18-34 (the tenant's default division for most participants).
Ages 3 + 100 are the platform floor + ceiling. Tenants may create narrower customs (Medium+); broader bounds require a support ticket.

The `Masters` group overlaps `Senior` (35-100 vs 50-100). Overlap is intentional — Masters is the competitive sub-set of Senior; the resolver's indeterminate strategy (default: refuse) forces callers to disambiguate.

Every U-group uses cutoff_date_kind=calendar_year — the most common youth-development shape. Tenants may edit individual seeded rows post-provision to switch to academic_year or rolling_from_birthday when their programme's federation uses a different rule (edits require the age_group.edit_seeded feature flag on Medium+).
`Adult` + `Senior` + `Masters` use cutoff_date_kind=rolling_from_birthday because 'adult' status is universally personal-birthday-based, not federation-cutoff-based.
Colors follow a light-to-dark progression across age (U6 = light blue, Masters = dark purple). Purely visual; tenants may override.
gender_category=any for every seeded row — tenants may create gender-segregated custom variants (e.g. 'Girls U12') via the age_group_custom entitlement.
sort_order is derived from min_age * 10 so seeded rows sort youngest-first with room for tenant customs to slot between them.

entries.name: U6
entries.description: Under 6 by calendar year. Suitable for early-years fundamentals + parent-participation programmes.

entries.name: U8
entries.description: Under 8 by calendar year. Entry-level competitive age group.

entries.name: U18
entries.description: Under 18 by calendar year. The last youth-safeguarding-scoped division (is_youth=true because max_age < 18).

entries.name: Adult
entries.description: Adult division — the tenant's default group. 18-34 covers the standard active-participation window.

entries.name: Senior
entries.description: Senior division. 35-100 covers the veteran/senior participation window. Overlaps Masters for competitive tenants.

entries.name: Masters
entries.description: Competitive masters division. 50-100 covers the competitive masters-athletics + masters-tennis + masters-swimming standard divisions.
